## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy Sprint Standup to discuss ongoing projects, client updates, and task assignments across the GrowthX team.](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Multiple client projects (Town, Engine, Augment Code, Biologica, Hypergrowth) progressing with content strategy, publication assignments, and editorial planning](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Topics

### Client Updates: Town, Engine, Augment Code

  - [Augment Code: Website issues being addressed, preparing for tomorrow's call with 4 execution lanes:](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
    1.  Editorial/publication: Content OS explanation, calibration article/topics
    2.  Newsletter: Raising subscriber limit, curating publication angles
    3.  AugmentCode.com: Directory integration with Raze
    4.  Design publication for newsletter
